asset_type: TaraHome Alexa compatibility article cover and 16:9 library card
prompt: Create a clean, photorealistic wide editorial smart-home background for a TaraHome blog cover, horizontal 3:2 composition. A warm modern bedroom or quiet living-room corner with a solid natural-oak console table across the lower third, softly textured warm off-white plaster wall, morning window light from the left, restrained dark forest-green ceramic planter with a small natural houseplant placed far to the right, and subtle linen texture. Leave the main center-left tabletop and wall intentionally empty and uncluttered so real product photographs can be composited there later. Camera at tabletop height, realistic interior photography, soft believable shadows, neutral warm color grading, premium but lived-in residential feeling. Do not include any smart speaker, plug, hub, phone, screen, cable, logo, text, letters, icons, diagrams, charts, UI cards, frames, panels, routing lines, network paths, progress bars, floating objects, or invented hardware.
